tasks.dependencies: Fetches the list of Forecasting endpoints/accounts/vendors to map over

tasks.task_type: PythonOperator.expand (dynamic task mapping, exponential backoff retries)
tasks.dependencies: One mapped instance per endpoint; retry policy is error-code-aware
Aggregates success/failure/retry counts across mapped instances
Evaluates aggregate retry/error rate against a storm threshold
Branch: retry rate within normal bounds
Branch: retry storm detected, trips circuit breaker for downstream calls
Pages on-call, attaches AutoRCA retry-storm analysis
Loads Forecasting target with successfully retrieved records

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_FCT_RETRY' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

incident.description: Retry Storm incident on the Forecasting pipeline (RTL_FCT_RETRY): customers CRM sync retry storm.
incident.symptoms: Salesforce CRM incremental sync task retried 620 times within its scheduled window.
incident.root_cause: A Salesforce API version deprecation silently changed an error response's HTTP status from 400 to 429 for a specific malformed-query condition, and the retry policy treats all 429s as rate-limiting (retry), when in this case it was a genuine query bug needing a fix, not a retry.
incident.business_impact: CRM sync never completed, so customer service agents worked from a data snapshot up to 18 hours stale during a product recall communication effort.
incident.resolution: Fix the malformed SOQL query causing the error; add response-body inspection (not just status code) to differentiate genuine rate-limiting from misclassified errors.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: A Salesforce API version deprecation silently changed an error response's HTTP status from 400 to 429 for a specific malformed-query condition, and the retry policy treats all 429s as rate-limiting (retry), when in this case it was a genuine query bug needing a fix, not a retry.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow task retry log shows identical error message text across all 620 attempts, suggesting a deterministic (not transient) failure
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog external_api.429_response_rate spiked but salesforce.api_usage_limit metric stayed well under threshold - a red flag that it wasn't real rate limiting
expected_rca.resolution: Fix the malformed SOQL query causing the error; add response-body inspection (not just status code) to differentiate genuine rate-limiting from misclassified errors.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add a rule to the DAG factory's error-handling template requiring response-body pattern matching for ambiguous status codes like 429, not status-code-only classification.
